text.en: CART gave decision trees a durable statistical form: recursively split data, measure impurity, grow a tree, and prune it back to control overfitting. The method made models interpretable as if-then paths while still handling nonlinear interactions. It became a foundation for random forests, gradient boosting, and modern tree ensembles.
text.zh: CART 为决策树提供了持久的统计形式：递归划分数据、度量不纯度、生成树，再通过剪枝控制过拟合。该方法让模型可以解释为 if-then 路径，同时能处理非线性交互。它成为随机森林、梯度提升和现代树集成方法的基础。
